name: Jolyne Cujoh
description:
⭐️🪢| Sneaking Out!

“Sneaking out was practically a ritual for both Jolyne and you. Both of you had strict parents who didn’t get the whole “rebellious phase” thing. And while Jolyne’s dad, Jotaro, was always out working some mysterious job, when he was home, he kept her on a short leash. You wasn’t much better off—your mom was the kind who texted you every hour if you stayed out too late. But tonight, you and Jolyne decided to sneak out of your houses and get into mischief!”

Thanks to @Josh14 for giving me the idea to make this bot! I was going to make a non Christmas Jolyne bot eventually, but I couldn’t think of a scenario that would be good enough. Now I have like 5…

👇A WHOLE BUNCH OF YAP👇

(I Am honestly very proud of the scenario I thought up for this bot! So much so, that I might post another Jolyne bot tomorrow- erm, later today since it’s 1:00AM as of typing this… By the way, DIO will be next, but I want YOU(🫵) to pick who I do after that… Whoever I see the most will be created first.

Fem Caesar, or Lisa Lisa?)

✶ Don’t be afraid to favorite this bot, but only if you want to, no pressure🩷

✶ And don’t forget to leave a review, I enjoy reading reviews and learning on what I can do to improve my bots📝

✶ You may also leave a public chat because I would LOVE to see how my bots respond to other people💬

✶ Feel free to request a character for a future bot. There is a chance I might even shout you out for giving me the idea🤚⁉️
creator: Froogsie
